Publications

References

1 - Satellite megaconstellations will threaten space-based astronomy** - Borlaff, Marcum & Howell (2025): Nature, Volume 648, Issue 8092, pp. 51-57. DOI: 10.1038/s41586-025-09759-5

Borlaff et al. (2025) - Paper in NASA/ADS

Borlaff et al. (2025) - Database in Zenodo

2 - SPHEREx confirms predictions for artificial satellite trail pollution in Low Earth Orbit - Borlaff, Marcum, Howell, Sánchez-Alarcón, Dubois, McDowell (2026): In revision by The Astronomical Journal.

Paper in NASA/ADS: In revision by The Astronomical Journal.

Borlaff et al. (2026) - Database in Zenodo

Related Articles

1 - Satellite swarms set to photobomb more than 95% of some telescopes’ images - Jenna Ahart (2025, Nature News)

2 - Even in space, telescopes can’t escape photobombers - Meredith Rawls (2025, Nature News & Views)

How to Cite SPARKLES

If you make use of the SPARKLES forecasts, models, or data in your research, please cite the following publications:

@ARTICLE{2025Natur.648...51B,
   author = {{Borlaff}, Alejandro S. and {Marcum}, Pamela M. and {Howell}, Steve B.},
    title = "{Satellite megaconstellations will threaten space-based astronomy}",
  journal = {\nat},
 keywords = {Physical Sciences, Astronomical and Space Sciences},
     year = 2025,
    month = dec,
   volume = {648},
   number = {8092},
    pages = {51-57},
      doi = {10.1038/s41586-025-09759-5},
   adsurl = {https://ui.adsabs.harvard.edu/abs/2025Natur.648...51B},
  adsnote = {Provided by the SAO/NASA Astrophysics Data System}
}

@misc{borlaff_2025_zenodo_17655052,
      author       = {S. Borlaff, Alejandro},
      title        = {Satellite megaconstellations will threaten space-based astronomy},
      month        = nov,
      year         = 2025,
      publisher    = {Zenodo},
      doi          = {10.5281/zenodo.17655052},
      url          = {https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17655052},
     }
